name: Crockpot Stuffed Peppers
recipeIngredient: 7 small Green and/or red peppers (tops removed and seeded)
1 cup Shredded cheese (I use 1/2 tsp Worcestershire sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash peppers and drain well.
2. Combine all remaining ingredients except ketchup in a mixing bowl. Stir well.
3. Stuff peppers 2/3 full with the mixture.
4. Pour 3 tablespoons water into the crockpot.
5. Arrange stuffed peppers in the crockpot.
6. Pour ketchup over top of peppers.
7. Cover and cook on low for 7-9 hours or high for 3-4 hours.
